training_status: slow running/walking, Zone 2-3 heart rate training

benefits.description: Reduced food noise and appetite control; moved from 2 meals to 1 meal per day with 1-hour eating window; portion sizes decreased considerably; fullness signal fires earlier
Body fat decreased from 25.6% to 15.9%; visible fat loss in face, gut, hips, and buttocks; muscle mass remained stable per scale

side_effects.description: Wasn't feeling it on days 5-7 of initial dosing

protocol_notes: 5'9" male, 50 years old. Previously tried South Beach, Keto, Carnivore diets with weight regain. Started with 0.5 mg weekly for approximately 4 weeks, then switched to 1.0 mg weekly. Combined with lifestyle changes: 2 meals to 1 meal per day, primarily healthy proteins and carbs with occasional frozen treats, slow walking/pacing with inclines (Zone 2-3 cardio), eliminated jogging/running. Reported no prior GLP experience. No libido issues noted. Scale used was a $30 body composition scale with app (noted as potentially inaccurate). Currently at 15% body fat, aiming for 10%.
